updates.tweet_text: The biggest game changer for me was realizing the most powerful edge is sitting on hands. Its the unplanned, impulse trades that don't correlate to any setup that generate losses. I plan exactly where I am going to enter & have 1 setup that I look for there. Otherwise, no trading
updates.notes: Motivational/philosophical tweet about trading discipline. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels named.
Reply to a user expressing a preference; no price named, no actionable level, pure conversational commentary.

updates.tweet_text:
Untradable grind up continues in #ES_F. Last entry was the 7516 Failed Breakdown Thursday. 7516-7565 was the range. When ranges break, we trend for 1-3 days. 7620 was next target, hit exact.

Plan: Ride runner. 7604 (watch traps), 7585=supports.  7620-24, 7631, 7642 next targets https://t.co/eb3gtSbV8R
updates.notes: 7631 and 7642 named as 'next targets' (new, not in morning plan); 7604 named as watch-for-traps bear level (new). 7585/7620-24 are morning plan reaffirmations.
